recommendations.title: Monte Carlo
recommendations.overview: Three young women vacationing in Paris find themselves whisked away to Monte Carlo after one of the girls is mistaken for a British heiress.

recommendations.title: Falling for Christmas
recommendations.overview: An engaged, spoiled hotel heiress finds herself in the care of a handsome, blue-collar lodge owner and his precocious daughter after getting amnesia in a skiing accident.

recommendations.title: Penelope
recommendations.overview: Forlorn heiress Penelope Wilhern is cursed, and the only way out is to fall in love with someone of suitable stock. But how can she find her soulmate when she's sequestered inside her family's estate with only her parents to keep her company? This un

recommendations.title: Twin Sitters
recommendations.overview: An evil business executive is releasing dangerous toxins and the Barbarian Brothers set out to stop his evil work.

recommendations.title: Heli
recommendations.overview: Heli must try and protect his young family when his 12-year-old sister inadvertently involves them in the brutal drug world. He must battle against the drug cartel that have been angered as well as the corrupt police force.

recommendations.title: The Love Scam
recommendations.overview: Drowning in debt, two brothers concoct a plan to scam a wealthy heiress and save their home in Naples — but unexpected love soon complicates the scheme.

recommendations.title: Sex and the City
recommendations.overview: A New York writer on sex and love is finally getting married to her Mr. Big. But her three best girlfriends must console her after one of them inadvertently leads Mr. Big to jilt her.

recommendations.title: Jagged Edge
recommendations.overview: After a wealthy heiress is murdered in her beach house, her devastated husband becomes the prime suspect. He hires a lawyer who hasn’t taken a criminal case in years, and as they work together, a complicated romance develops amidst the trial.

recommendations.title: Spanish Affair 2
recommendations.overview: Amaia after breaking up with Rafa, falls in love with a Catalonian. Koldo, her father, goes to Sevilla to persuade Rafa to go to Catalonia and take Amaia's heart back.

recommendations.title: Kung Fu Panda: Secrets of the Scroll
recommendations.overview: As Po looks for his lost action figures, the story of how the panda inadvertently helped create the Furious Five is told.
